overall.description: A cinematic drive through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring dense fog, neon-lit billboards, and futuristic architecture. The footage from Cyberpunk 2077 shows the vehicle navigating multi-lane streets beneath massive elevated highways and past glowing holographic advertisements. The atmosphere is dark and moody with persistent haze reflecting the vibrant pink and cyan neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-slicked cyberpunk avenue with massive digital billboards

events.description: approaching intersection with red traffic lights visible ahead

agents.ego_description: driving forward through wet city streets, approaching an intersection with other vehicles visible ahead

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving ahead in the same lane, brake lights occasionally visible

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying a woman's face with blue eye makeup, dominating the left side of the street
hanging traffic sign displaying speed limit 40, suspended over the roadway
massive concrete overpass structure looming ahead, partially obscured by fog
overhead structure with traffic signals and additional signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy cyberpunk street at night, with a massive digital billboard featuring a woman's face dominating the left side. The camera moves forward along the wet asphalt, approaching a traffic light intersection. Futuristic vehicles are visible ahead, their lights reflecting off the rain-slicked road surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection beneath elevated highway infrastructure

events.description: entering major intersection with multiple lanes and traffic signals overhead
slight right turn while navigating through the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating through the intersection, passing other vehicles while maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: dark-colored futuristic car passing by on the left side

entered.detail: massive red neon circular hologram or signage mounted on a distant building, partially visible through the fog
huge elevated highway structure with thick support columns spanning across the road
tall structural column covered with multiple stacked digital advertisements
series of illuminated chevron arrows on the ground or suspended, indicating direction

segments.scene_description: The vehicle moves through a wide intersection, passing beneath traffic light gantries. The large red neon circular structure becomes visible on the right through the fog. The scene opens up as we approach and pass under massive concrete overpasses, with glowing arrow signs guiding the traffic flow.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level highway interchange with massive structural supports

events.description: passing directly beneath massive elevated highway structure, entering sheltered area
emerging from under the overpass into more open area with different lighting angles

agents.ego_description: driving under the massive overpass system, following the curve of the road while surrounded by concrete pillars

entered.detail: building facade with red neon Japanese characters and signage
yellow rectangular billboard with black text and symbols, mounted on a building
concrete barriers with reflective stripes lining the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: Driving beneath the massive concrete overpass, the environment becomes more enclosed and sheltered from the rain. The large red neon structure moves toward the center of the frame as the vehicle progresses. Japanese neon signage appears on the left, and yellow commercial billboards become visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with layered neon advertisements

events.description: exiting the overpass area into denser commercial zone with increased signage density
following vehicle ahead as traffic continues through the wet streets

agents.ego_description: continuing through the wet streets surrounded by dense neon signage and commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: futuristic car ahead with red brake lights illuminated, maintaining steady distance

entered.detail: structure spanning the road with multiple digital screens displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a dense commercial area with Japanese neon signage prominent on the left and the hydro-assist billboard on the right. The large red neon structure gradually moves to the left and fades into the distance. The vehicle continues driving through the perpetually wet, foggy streets illuminated by countless digital advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district that shifts from an open, billboard-dominated street into a sheltered urban canyon of neon signage. It begins on a foggy road where a massive digital billboard of a woman's face looms over wet asphalt, moving steadily toward a traffic light intersection filled with reflecting vehicle lights. As the camera glides through the wide intersection, the view expands beneath massive concrete overpasses and glowing arrow signs, while a large red neon circular structure emerges through the haze on the right. The environment then becomes more enclosed and sheltered under the heavy concrete architecture, shifting the red neon structure toward the center of the frame as Japanese signage and yellow commercial billboards flank the road. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into a dense commercial zone where the red structure fades into the distance, leaving the vehicle to navigate perpetually wet streets illuminated by a blur of digital advertisements.
